title: Aconitella thirkeana
taxonomy: Aconitella thirkeana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the buttercup family. It is native to the Himalayan region and is often found in alpine meadows and rocky outcrops. Within the Ranunculaceae family, Aconitella thirkeana is placed in the subfamily Ranunculoideae, which contains approximately 25 genera and 2,000 species. The exact classification within the subfamily is not specified, but it is likely to be in the tribe Anemoneae or Ranunculeae. Further research is needed to determine the exact classification and relationships within the Ranunculaceae family.
